heading: Limitations
label: 3403 Limitations
notes: Amendments1978— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 95–454section 3393 of this title
amendments: Amendments1978— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 95–454section 3393 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: An agency shall not abolish any position occupied by an employee in order to make the duties of such position available to be performed on a part-time career employment basis.

children.label: b
children.text: Any person who is employed on a full-time basis in an agency shall not be required to accept part-time employment as a condition of continued employment.
